name: Private Mode Timed Private Mode Contracts
purpose: Define enforceable Private Mode and Timed Private Mode behavior across memory, Carnos, dashboards, timeline, analytics, export, connectors, Spotify, audit, and UI badges.

schema_requirement.reason: 20E defines state and enforcement rules only. It does not create privacy_settings rows, private mode session rows, persistence, migrations, repositories, or live toggles.
schema_requirement.future_schema_gate: If a later chunk persists Private Mode, Timed Private Mode, privacy_settings, private sessions, audit rows, or toggle history, inspect exact schema before coding.

private_mode_states.meaning: Private Mode is active until the user disables it.
private_mode_states.memory_behavior: automatic memory candidate creation is blocked
private_mode_states.carnos_behavior: sensitive summaries and broad sensitive context are blocked
private_mode_states.connector_behavior: external connector actions require review or are blocked depending on risk
private_mode_states.spotify_behavior: Spotify actions are blocked unless explicitly approved for a narrow safe action

private_mode_states.meaning: Private Mode is active until a declared expiry time.
private_mode_states.memory_behavior: automatic memory candidate creation is blocked until expiry
private_mode_states.carnos_behavior: sensitive summaries and broad context are blocked until expiry
private_mode_states.connector_behavior: connector actions are restricted until expiry
private_mode_states.spotify_behavior: Spotify actions are restricted until expiry

private_mode_states.meaning: Private Mode remains active until the user manually disables it.

timed_private_mode_options.label: Current session
timed_private_mode_options.expiry_behavior: expires when the current app session ends or the user disables it

timed_private_mode_options.label: Until tomorrow
timed_private_mode_options.expiry_behavior: expires at the next local-day boundary chosen by the app policy

enforcement_rules: Private Mode blocks automatic memory candidate creation.
Private Mode blocks Carnos memory writes.
Private Mode blocks sensitive summaries by default.
Private Mode blocks broad dashboard exposure of private and sensitive data.
Private Mode blocks broad timeline exposure of private and sensitive data.
Private Mode blocks analytics use of private and sensitive data unless a narrow approved rule exists.
Private Mode blocks automatic export preparation.
Private Mode blocks destructive action automation.
Private Mode restricts external connector actions.
Timed Private Mode keeps the same restrictions until expiry.
Expired Timed Private Mode must stop enforcing timed restrictions after expiry.
Manual disable must be user-driven and audited.
Carnos cannot bypass Private Mode by using remembered context.
Carnos cannot convert Private Mode content into memory without user approval.

surface_behavior.behavior: show private-mode active state and block automatic new Carnos memory candidates
show private-mode badge and restrict Carnos usage of sensitive memories
avoid sensitive context injection and do not create memory candidates automatically
hide or redact private and sensitive cards unless explicitly allowed
hide or redact private and sensitive events unless explicitly allowed
exclude private and sensitive data from active calculations unless approved
require explicit user action and preview; no automatic export preparation
block automation and require explicit review/confirmation
restrict connector actions and require review for risk-bearing actions
block or review Spotify actions and prevent listening history memory creation

carnos_rules: Carnos may explain what Private Mode does.
Carnos may tell the user Private Mode is active.
Carnos may propose turning on Private Mode when appropriate.
Carnos cannot enable Private Mode silently.
Carnos cannot bypass Private Mode with older memories.
Carnos cannot create memory candidates from Private Mode content without approval.
Carnos cannot summarize sensitive Private Mode content unless explicitly allowed.
Carnos cannot trigger connector actions that Private Mode blocks.
Carnos cannot trigger Spotify actions that Private Mode blocks.
connector_rules: External connector actions must check Private Mode before proposal or execution.
Connector data reads must respect Private Mode and redaction rules.
Connector action review must show Private Mode status.
Connector audit events must record Private Mode blocking when applicable.
Connector token boundaries are unchanged and must remain inaccessible to Carnos.
spotify_rules: Spotify actions must check Private Mode before proposal or execution.
Spotify listening history must not become memory during Private Mode without explicit approval.
Spotify recently played data is treated as sensitive during Private Mode.
Spotify playback control is blocked or review-required during Private Mode.
Spotify audit events must record Private Mode blocking when applicable.
Spotify token values remain inaccessible to Carnos.
must_not_do: do not invent privacy_settings schema in 20E
do not implement live Private Mode toggle persistence in 20E
do not implement session storage in 20E
do not implement runtime connector blocking in 20E
do not implement runtime Spotify blocking in 20E
do not let Carnos disable Private Mode
do not let Carnos bypass Private Mode
do not allow automatic memory writes during Private Mode
do not allow automatic export or destructive action during Private Mode
acceptance: Timed Private Mode options are defined.
